Localization.Description: A user archived data using a utility or PowerShell cmdlet

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: A user archived data using a PowerShell cmdlet on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.name} archived data using a PowerShell cmdlet on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.name} archived data using the utility {object.process.name} on host {event_src.host}
